headline: Alpha Corp posts record Q4 earnings, smashing analyst estimates
body: Alpha Corporation reported EPS of $3.45, surpassing Wall Street expectations of $2.90. Revenue grew 18% year-over-year, driven by strong demand across all product lines. Management raised full-year guidance.

headline: Beta Industries warns of supply chain disruptions, cuts revenue outlook
body: Beta Industries cited ongoing semiconductor shortages and logistics bottlenecks as key risks to its Q1 outlook. The company revised revenue guidance downward by 12%, sending shares lower in pre-market trading.

headline: Gamma Systems awarded $2B government defense contract
body: Gamma Systems has secured a multi-year, $2 billion contract with the Department of Defense for advanced communications infrastructure. The deal is the largest in the company's history and is expected to significantly boost margins over the next three years.

headline: Fed signals rate hike pause — tech and mid-cap stocks rally broadly
body: Federal Reserve minutes released today indicate policymakers are leaning toward holding rates steady through the next quarter. Markets responded positively, with growth and technology-adjacent names seeing broad buying interest.

headline: Sector rotation: investors flee growth stocks amid inflation fears
body: A surprise uptick in CPI data triggered a broad rotation out of growth-oriented sectors. Analysts warn of continued volatility as bond yields spike. Both Beta and Gamma saw elevated sell pressure in afternoon trading.

headline: Breaking: Alpha Corp announces surprise $5B share buyback program
body: In a surprise move after market hours, Alpha Corp announced a $5 billion share repurchase program to be executed over the next 18 months. The announcement came alongside a dividend increase of 15%, signaling strong confidence from the board in future cash flows.

headline: Global markets rally as trade deal tensions ease following diplomatic breakthrough
body: A joint statement from trade negotiators signals a de-escalation in tariff disputes that have weighed on markets for months. All three major asset classes are expected to benefit, with analysts upgrading near-term price targets across the board.

headline: Gamma Systems faces DOJ antitrust inquiry over recent acquisitions
body: The Department of Justice has opened a preliminary inquiry into Gamma Systems' recent acquisition activity, citing potential market concentration concerns. Shares fell sharply on the news as investors weighed potential regulatory remedies including forced divestitures.
